summary: Frontend-only verification of About portrait image replacement. Image now serves a non-AI square crop of the user's actual photo from /assets/anil_professional.png. All technical wiring criteria pass: portrait loads correctly (naturalWidth=1024, complete=true), file served as image/png 1.18MB, no pose-toggle buttons in DOM, hero name renders, nav links present, skills logos visible, contact CTAs (mailto + LinkedIn) functional, zero console errors on load.
critical_code_review_comments: Old asset paths /assets/anil_front.png and /assets/anil_side.png return HTTP 200 with content-type text/html (~6.5KB) because the SPA index.html fallback catches missing static asset routes. Files do not exist on disk (verified ls /app/frontend/public/assets/ shows only anil_professional.png), and no DOM reference exists, so this is harmless. If strict 404 semantics on stale image URLs ever matter for SEO/cache invalidation, consider an explicit /assets/* 404 rule on the static server.
context_for_next_testing_agent: About portrait migrated from AI-generated headshot to real user square-crop photo at /assets/anil_professional.png (1024x1024, 1.18MB). Old front/side toggle removed from About.jsx. Old image files anil_front.png/anil_side.png deleted from public/assets. SPA fallback returns index.html (200, text/html) for those stale URLs but they are not referenced anywhere in the DOM.

verification_evidence.contact_ctas: 3 mailto links and 3 LinkedIn links present
